news.title: As Digital India turns 11, govt bets on AI, semiconductors to drive next growth phase
news.description: [THE TRIBUNE] As the Digital India programme completes 11 years on July 1, the government on Saturday highlighted a shift in its focus towards artificial intelligence (AI) and semiconductor manufacturing, saying it has approved investments worth Rs 1.64 lakh...

news.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

news.title: TS LAWCET, TS PGLCET Counselling 2026 Schedule Out: Counselling Registration Starts from July 5

news.title: Japan draft AI plan targets cyber threats, AI-generated misinformation
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] JAPAN'S government has released a draft revision of its AI Basic Plan that proposes closer cooperation with foreign governments and artificial intelligence developers while expanding measures to address cyber threats and AI-generated misinformation.

news.title: Zoom unveils AI assistant for workplace tasks
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] ZOOM Communications Inc. has launched ZoomMate, an artificial intelligence (AI) assistant designed to help users turn workplace conversations into completed tasks by connecting meetings with business applications and enterprise workflows.

news.title: AI’s Coming Reality Check: When the Physics Finally Hits the Hype

news.title: AI firm opens Makati hub, expands overseas operations
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] AN ARTIFICIAL intelligence company said it has expanded its operations in the Philippines and overseas as it opened its first regional innovation hub in Makati City.

news.title: Google.org Invests $10 Million to Boost AI Literacy in Asia Pacific via AVPN
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] ​THE Asian social investor network AVPN announced the expansion of the AI Opportunity Fund: Asia-Pacific with an additional contribution of $10 million from Google.org to improve artificial intelligence literacy among educators and the youth.

news.title: South Korea regulation could cost US states $525 billion, model finds
news.description: [FOX NEWS] South Korea's proposed Online Platform Fairness Act could cost U.S. states $525 billion over a decade, according to a Competere Foundation model estimating major losses.

news.title: Salesforce Stock: Time To Fill Up The Truck With This Incredible Bargain (NYSE:CRM)
news.description: [SEEKING ALPHA] Fears that Salesforce is about to get disrupted by artificial intelligence have become completely overblown. Find out why CRM stock is a strong buy.
